'''lotazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jel|jel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jel|jel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lotazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lotazithi|lotazithi]] || [[word:lotaziji|lotaziji]] || [[word:lotazishi|lotazishi]] || [[word:lotaziki|lotaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lotazuthuthu|lotazuthuthu]] || [[word:lotazujuju|lotazujuju]] || [[word:lotazushushu|lotazushushu]] || [[word:lotazukuku|lotazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lotazuthu|lotazuthu]] || [[word:lotazuju|lotazuju]] || [[word:lotazushu|lotazushu]] || [[word:lotazuku|lotazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lotazufthuf|lotazufthuf]] || [[word:lotazufjuf|lotazufjuf]] || [[word:lotazufshuf|lotazufshuf]] || [[word:lotazufkuf|lotazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lotazethe|lotazethe]] || [[word:lotazeje|lotazeje]] || [[word:lotazeshe|lotazeshe]] || [[word:lotazeke|lotazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lotazothotho|lotazothotho]] || [[word:lotazojojo|lotazojojo]] || [[word:lotazoshosho|lotazoshosho]] || [[word:lotazokoko|lotazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lotazotho|lotazotho]] || [[word:lotazojo|lotazojo]] || [[word:lotazosho|lotazosho]] || [[word:lotazoko|lotazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lotazofthof|lotazofthof]] || [[word:lotazofjof|lotazofjof]] || [[word:lotazofshof|lotazofshof]] || [[word:lotazofkof|lotazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfthÃŸf|lotazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfjÃŸf|lotazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfshÃŸf|lotazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfkÃŸf|lotazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lotazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lotazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lotazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lotazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfthÃŸf|lotazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfjÃŸf|lotazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfshÃŸf|lotazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfkÃŸf|lotazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfthÃŸf|lotazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfjÃŸf|lotazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfshÃŸf|lotazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lotazÃŸfkÃŸf|lotazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lotazÃḊthÃḊ|lotazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lotazÃḊjÃḊ|lotazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lotazÃḊshÃḊ|lotazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lotazÃḊkÃḊ|lotazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lotazathatha|lotazathatha]] || [[word:lotazajaja|lotazajaja]] || [[word:lotazashasha|lotazashasha]] || [[word:lotazakaka|lotazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lotazatha|lotazatha]] || [[word:lotazaja|lotazaja]] || [[word:lotazasha|lotazasha]] || [[word:lotazaka|lotazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lotazafthaf|lotazafthaf]] || [[word:lotazafjaf|lotazafjaf]] || [[word:lotazafshaf|lotazafshaf]] || [[word:lotazafkaf|lotazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lotazasha|lotazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lotazshÃḋsha|lotazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lotazrosha|lotazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lotazmusha|lotazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lotazyasha|lotazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golotaznkshÃḋsha|golotaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golotaznkrosha|golotaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golotaznkmusha|golotaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golotaznkyasha|golotaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lotatazasha|lotatazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lotatazshÃḋsha|lotatazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lotatazrosha|lotatazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lotatazmusha|lotatazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lotatazyasha|lotatazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golotataznkshÃḋsha|golotataznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golotataznkrosha|golotataznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golotataznkmusha|golotataznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golotataznkyasha|golotataznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:letÃḊzasha|letÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:letÃḊzshÃḋsha|letÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:letÃḊzrosha|letÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:letÃḊzmusha|letÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:letÃḊzyasha|letÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goletÃḊznkshÃḋsha|goletÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goletÃḊznkrosha|goletÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goletÃḊznkmusha|goletÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goletÃḊznkyasha|goletÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lotfazasha|lotfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lotfazshÃḋsha|lotfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lotfazrosha|lotfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lotfazmusha|lotfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lotfazyasha|lotfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golotfaznkshÃḋsha|golotfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golotfaznkrosha|golotfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golotfaznkmusha|golotfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golotfaznkyasha|golotfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
